name: Dark Magic Inheritance
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>継</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>承</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Banish 2 Spells from your GY; add 1 Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, that specifically lists the card "Dark Magician" or "Dark Magician Girl" in its text, except "Dark Magic Inheritance". You can only activate 1 "Dark Magic Inheritance" per turn.
eff: Banish 2 Spells from your GY; add 1 Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, that specifically lists the card "Dark Magician" or "Dark Magician Girl" in its text, except "Dark Magic Inheritance". You can only activate 1 "Dark Magic Inheritance" per turn.
